# Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

This project adopts the [`Contributor Covenant, version 2.1`](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/) as its Code of Conduct. The full text is available at the linked URL and is incorporated here by reference.

In summary: contributors and maintainers commit to making participation in this project a respectful, harassment-free experience for everyone, regardless of background or identity.

## Scope

This Code of Conduct applies to all project spaces — issues, pull requests, discussions, and any other channels associated with the project — and to any individual representing the project in public spaces.

## Enforcement

Instances of behavior that violate this Code of Conduct may be reported privately to the project maintainer:

- **Email:** `svdc1mail@gmail.com` with subject line `[scrape-do-python conduct]`
- **GitHub:** open a private [`Security Advisory`](https://github.com/svdC1/scrape-do-python/security/advisories/new) (these are private to the maintainer; the conduct channel uses the same private surface)

All reports will be reviewed and investigated promptly and fairly. The maintainer will respect the privacy and safety of the reporter.

## Attribution

This Code of Conduct is adapted from the [`Contributor Covenant, version 2.1`](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/)
